arts.ttl: Hearts vs Hibs: After horror starts who will claim derby bragging rights?
arts.sum: When Heart of Midlothian and Hibernian last met on Boxing Day, Martin Boyle's double kept Hearts rooted to the bottom of the Scottish Premiership table. Five months later, they were relegated.

Two points and two places separate tenth-placed Hearts and Hibs in eighth ahead of the second Edinburgh derby in the Scottish Premiership this season. Heart of Midlothian recovered from their contine...
